assistantForm.createDescription: Define a new personalized assistant for your students
assistantForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this assistant does...
assistantForm.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are an expert math tutor who helps high school students...
assistantForm.systemPromptHelp: Define how the assistant should behave and what tone to use.
assistantForm.temperatureHelp: 0 = More precise and consistent responses | 1 = More creative and varied responses
assistantForm.isPublicHelp: If checked, all students can access this assistant

assistantManagement.uploadDescription: Documents will be automatically processed to improve assistant responses using RAG
assistantManagement.manageDocuments: Manage documents associated with this assistant
assistantManagement.assignDescription: Control which students have access to this assistant
assistantManagement.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the assistant
assistantManagement.deleteDescriptionExtra: and all its associated data (documents, assignments, chats).
